source: Route adapted from the poe2campaignguide.com 0.5 checklist (free community guide). Path of Exile 2 content © Grinding Gear Games.
note: Speedrun view shows non-optional steps + permanent-upgrade rewards only; optional steps and loot/currency are hidden by default.

steps.label: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack
Kill The Devourer and report back to camp
steps.reward: Uncut Skill Gem L2 + Uncut Support Gem L1 + 100 Gold

steps.label: Tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Lesser Ward Rune

steps.label: Loot Aregane's Hut and slay the Rare
steps.reward: Medium Life and Mana Flask + Uncut Support Gem L1

steps.label: Take Runed Girdle, Runed Guard, and Runed Skull Cap
Return to Town, talk to NPCs for Runed Spikes
Enter Grim Tangle (center of Grelwood)
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Skill Gem L3

steps.label: Talk to Lachlann
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Regal Orb

steps.label: Kill Asinia, the Praetor's Consort
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): random Amulet

steps.label: Loot Haunted Treasure and slay the Rare
steps.reward: Rare item + Uncut Support Gem L1

steps.label: Kill the dryads at Dryadic Ritual
Runes of Aldur reward (first clear)
steps.note: Good but skippable

steps.label: Complete all rituals
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Support Gem L1

steps.label: Kill The King in the Mists
Take Una's Lute from Una's Lute Box
Tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Runic Alloy

steps.label: Take Smithing Tools from salvage bench
Portal to Town, talk to Renly
Loot Blacksmith's chest next to Smithing Tools
Return to Town, deliver Una's Lute to NPCs
Kill Candlemass, the Living Rite
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Orb of Alchemy — good for level 16 weapons

steps.label: Talk to the Hooded One, proceed to Act 2
Kill Rathbreaker
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Spirit Gem L5

steps.label: Tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Exalted Orb

steps.label: Talk to Asala
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Gemcutter's Prism

steps.label: Kill serpents for Kabala Clan Relic
Enter Lost City, go to Buried Shrines
Enter Buried Shrines, go to Heart of Keth
Find Elemental Shrine and loot a chest
Take Everburning Cinders, ignite Water Goddess
Enter Mastodon Badlands, go to Lightless Passage
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Lesser Jeweller's Orb — Do not skip

steps.label: Speak to Lurking Creature (Reveal Desecrated mods)
Kill monsters for Sun Clan Relic
Kill Iktab, the Deathlord and Ekbab, Ancient Steed
Activate Medallion near waypoint
steps.reward: +1 Charm Slot + swappable: 30% Charm Charges gained or Charm Effect Duration

steps.label: Runes of Aldur reward (first clear)
steps.note: Can be good

steps.label: Kill Zalmarath, the Colossus
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Support Gem L2

steps.label: Return to caravan, sound The Horn of the Vastiri
Find Lailuma's Body, take Final Letter
Loot container along left or right wall
Kill Hunin, Storm Caller and Mugin, Frost Bringer
Return to Town, deliver Final Letter to Shambrin
Complete the Trial of the Sekhemas — Ascend
steps.note: First Ascendancy of the game. Enter using Balbala's Barya (dropped by Balbala in Traitor's Passage); watch your Honour. Recommended ~Level 28+.

steps.label: Talk to Asala, proceed to Act 3
Enter Sandswept Marsh, go to Ziggurat Encampment
Kill Mighty Silverfist
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Support Gem L3

steps.label: Find camp with Trader and loot chests
Take Corpse-snake Venom from corpse (end of zone)
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Skill Gem L9

steps.label: Return to Town, talk to Servi — choose permanent buff
steps.reward: Stun Threshold or Ailment Threshold or Mana Regen (permanent)

steps.label: Find camp with Trader and loot chests
Complete the Trial of Chaos — Ascend
steps.note: Enter using the Chimeral Inscribed Ultimatum. Grants further Ascendancy Points — 8 total across all trial tiers, with the rest earned in the endgame.

steps.label: Tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Artificer's Orb

steps.label: Collect Small Soul Cores and activate Stone Altars
Find 3 Medium Soul Cores and start 2 Generators (corners)
Activate Large Soul Core near Alva
Kill Zicoatl, Warden of the Core
Walk over the Canal pressure pads
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Spirit Gem L10. (0.5: levers are now walk-over pads; final canal is pre-drained — just walk through.)

steps.label: Find Jungle Grave, interact with Servi
steps.note: Servi relocated here with the Azak Bog entrance in 0.5.

steps.label: Start the Flame Ritual
steps.note: Great EXP spot — respawn at checkpoint to repeat

steps.label: Talk to Alva, tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Medved's Crest of the Circle

steps.label: Climb stairs twice (corner of pyramid)
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Spirit Gem L11

steps.label: Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
Summon Alva, enter gateway, tag waypoint
Tag waypoint
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Skill Gem L11

steps.label: Talk to Alva, proceed to Act 4
Talk to NPCs for Book Charter, talk to Makoru
Sail to and enter Kedge Bay
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Uncut Support Gem L4

steps.label: Take Verisium, talk to Dannig for Verisium Spikes
Talk to Freya, activate Karui Totems
Kill Great White One
steps.note: Take the Shark Fin — turn it in at Ngakanu for a permanent defence buff.

steps.label: Return to Kingsmarch's Karui boat, sail to Ngakanu, turn in Shark Fin to Kaimana
steps.reward: Swappable: Kaom's Lesson (+30% Armour/Evasion/Energy Shield) or Rakiata's Lesson
steps.note: Kaom's Lesson (Red): flat +30% Armour, Evasion, Energy Shield. Rakiata's Lesson (Blue): 15% of Armour also applies to Elemental Damage, Deflection = 12% of Evasion, +12% faster Energy Shield recharge.

steps.label: Activate Goddess of Justice
steps.reward: +30% Life or Mana Recovery from Flasks (swappable)

steps.label: Search outer walls of Isle of Kin
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Gemcutter's Prism

steps.label: Activate Well of Hinekora, pass 3 tests
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Chaos Orb

steps.label: Enter church, exit church, destroy forcefield
Kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
Find and interact with both Bells
Kill Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
Enter forge, talk to Hooded One
Sail to Ngakanu, talk to Rhodri
steps.note: Runestone (first clear): Greater Jeweller's Orb — DO NOT SKIP

steps.label: Talk to the Hooded One, proceed to Interludes
Kill Akthi, the Final Sting and Anundr, the Sandworm
Go to Skullmaw Stairway, take Molten One's Gift
Find 2 Baryas and place in sockets (left and right of map)
steps.reward: 1 of 4 rare Amulets + 1 of 4 rare Rings

steps.label: Activate all Seven Pillars (hidden at edges of map)
steps.note: Options: +5 All Attr / +5% All Ele Res / +12% Cooldown Recovery / +3% Move Speed / +20% AoE / +15% Global Defences

steps.label: Find Vials and use on wells
Activate Grand Barya, talk to Jado
Talk to the Hooded One, proceed to Interlude 2
Enter Ashen Forest, go to Kriar Village
Talk to Elder Madox
steps.reward: Free Unique Item of your choice

steps.label: Kill Zelina, Blood Priestess and Zolin, Blood Priest
Talk to the Hooded One, proceed to Interlude 3
Kill Heldra of the Black Pyre and Isolde of the White Shroud
Kill Siora, Blade of the Mists
Interact with Soul of the Ferryman (center of zone)
Kill Thane Wulfric and Lady Elswyth
Talk to the Hooded One — all interludes complete
Travel to Oriath, run one map to unlock mapping

items: Fresh character on the correct league (SSF for ladder runs)
Decide your category: Act 1 / Act 3 / Full Campaign
Close background apps and cap FPS for stable, fast zone loads
Import a leveling filter (Semi-Strict) before the run
Highlight your build's target weapon/armour bases; hide the rest
Pre-write stash/vendor regex — movement boots: i.+mov · resist: resi · life: ife$
Plan your level-1 skill + first support gem
Note which Uncut Skill/Support gems to cut for your build at each level gate
Pick a leveling-friendly Ascendancy and when to take it (~Lv 28 is current meta)
Bind a movement skill (Leap Slam / Shield Charge) as soon as you have a weapon
Plan resistances per act boss (e.g. Cold for Geonor); aim ~300/600/900 life by end of A1/A2/A3
Enable "Always Attack Without Moving" on every skill (re-enable when you slot a new gem)
Hold Ctrl to reach the extra skill binds; set a comfortable flask layout
Options → Game: remove gem-cut/equip confirmation prompts so Ctrl+Click is instant
Run Act 1 a couple times to lock in muscle memory — the opening sets your pace
"Town is lava" — minimise town time; hug the wall when lost
Chain blue (magic) packs, skip white trash; grab skill-point branches first
